detail: init objective="Fix ocx 413 Payload Too Large on image-heavy Anthropic sessions (claude-fable-5): extend src/adapters/anthropic-image-guard.ts with a total-byte budget rule (textify oldest images until under a safe cap below Anthropic's 32MB request limit; also textify single images over the 5MB per-image cap), add unit tests in tests/anthropic-image-guard.test.ts, verify with bun test + typecheck, sol reviewer audits at A and C gates. Scope limited to the anthropic image guard + its tests; no other adapters, no new dependencies, no release." criteria=0
